allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('manifest templateId:', d['manifest']['templateId'], '| html bytes:', len\(d['html']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('warnings:', len\(d['warnings']\), '| severity:', d['warnings'][0]['severity'] if d['warnings'] else 'none'\)")
